entries.title: Duplicate code in experience_aggregation (aggregate vs preview)
entries.closure_note: V1.3 Wave 3: extracted shared helper to deduplicate aggregate vs preview

entries.title: O(N) idempotency check on promotion (file I/O scan)
entries.closure_note: O(N) file scan acceptable at current scale

entries.title: Session capture durability gap (fire-and-forget)
entries.closure_note: V1.3 Wave 2: added local file fallback for session capture

entries.title: Fragment TTL has no cleanup mechanism
entries.closure_note: Fragment TTL cleanup deferred to V1.4

entries.title: Slug collision risk (memory_id to slug truncation)
entries.closure_note: Slug collision probability low at expected scale

entries.title: Inefficient keyword dedup (Vec vs HashSet)
entries.closure_note: V1.3 Wave 4: changed keyword dedup from Vec to HashSet

entries.title: EXPERIENCE_MEMORY_KINDS hardcoded not derived from enum
entries.closure_note: Hardcoded array intentional; derive-from-enum requires const generics

entries.title: Token estimation is chars/4 approximation
entries.closure_note: chars/4 is rough approximation; accurate tokenization requires tiktoken
